zh.Buckenham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆
zh.Buckenham Castle, Buckenham, Norfolk, En: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴肯哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Clifton於大約1394年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron23歲，母親Margaret Howard19歲。他於1431年1月6日之前與Joan de Thorpe在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1447年12月1日之前。

zh-hans.Buckenham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆
zh-hans.Buckenham Castle, Buckenham, Norfolk, En: 英国英格兰諾福爾可巴肯哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Clifton于大约1394年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron23岁，母亲Margaret Howard19岁。他于1431年1月6日之前与Joan de Thorpe在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1447年12月1日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Clifton was born about 1394, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Howard, was 19. He married Joan de Thorpe before 6 January 1431, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died before 1 December 1447.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Clifton est né environ 1394, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Howard, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Thorpe avant 6 janvier 1431, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1 décembre 1447.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Clifton um 1394 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Howard 19. Er hat vor 6. Januar 1431 in England, United Kingdom Joan de Thorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1. Dezember 1447.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Clifton è nato il circa 1394 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Howard, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Thorpe prima del 6 gennaio 1431, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1 dicembre 1447.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cliftonが約1394年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baronは23歳，母Margaret Howardは19歳であった。1431年1月6日以前にイギリスイギリスでJoan de Thorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1447年12月1日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Clifton(이)가 대략 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Howard(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1431년 1월 6일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan de Thorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1447년 12월 1일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Clifton nasceu aproximadamente 1394, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Howard, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Thorpe antes 6 de janeiro de 1431, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1 de dezembro de 1447.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Clifton родился около 1394 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Howard, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Thorpe перед 6 январь 1431 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1 декабрь 1447 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Clifton nació aproximadamente 1394, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Howard, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joan de Thorpe antes de 6 de enero de 1431, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1 de diciembre de 1447.
